title: Home loans, interest rates, calculators & offers | CommBank
summary: A range of flexible home loans at competitive rates for buying or refinancing. Find helpful calculators, tools and guides for your first home or next property.

nodes.name: Helping you into your first home sooner
nodes.summary: Awarded Canstar’s Bank of the Year for First Home Buyers 9 and Digital Banking 10 in 2025, CommBank offers flexible home loan features to suit your needs.
